openMetricsConfig.prometheusConfig:
scrape_configs:

- job_name: cisco-telemetry-xr-dmm-ak
  relabel_configs:
    - source_labels: [ sessionId ]
      target_label: monitoredObjectId
    - source_labels: [ sessionName ]
      target_label: monitoredObjectName

    ## Assign correct directions
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_sd_operation_metric_bucket_minimum'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "0"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_sd_operation_metric_bucket_maximum'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "0"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_sd_operation_metric_bucket_average'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "0"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_sd_operation_metric_bucket_standard_deviation'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "0"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_ds_operation_metric_bucket_minimum'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "1"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_ds_operation_metric_bucket_maximum'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "1"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_ds_operation_metric_bucket_average'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "1"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_ds_operation_metric_bucket_standard_deviation'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "1"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_round_trip_delay_operation_metric_bucket_minimum'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "2"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_round_trip_delay_operation_metric_bucket_maximum'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "2"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_round_trip_delay_operation_metric_bucket_average'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "2"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_round_trip_delay_operation_metric_bucket_standard_deviation'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "2"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_delay_var_avg_rt'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "2"

    ## Apply metric renaming
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_sd_operation_metric_bucket_minimum'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_operation_metric_bucket_minimum"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_ds_operation_metric_bucket_minimum'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_operation_metric_bucket_minimum"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_sd_operation_metric_bucket_maximum'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_operation_metric_bucket_maximum"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_ds_operation_metric_bucket_maximum'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_operation_metric_bucket_maximum"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_sd_operation_metric_bucket_average'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_operation_metric_bucket_average"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_ds_operation_metric_bucket_average'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_operation_metric_bucket_average"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_delay_var_avg_rt'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_operation_metric_bucket_average"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_sd_operation_metric_bucket_standard_deviation'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_operation_metric_bucket_standard_deviation"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_ds_operation_metric_bucket_standard_deviation'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "sla_stats_metric_one_way_jitter_operation_metric_bucket_standard_deviation"

- job_name: throughput
  ## Relabeling rules which apply to label names.
  ## Note - by default the original labels are also kept.  If you wish to have the original named
  ##        labels removed, use a 'dropLabel' action such as the following:
  ##  - regex: {{insert your label name here}}
  ##    action: labeldrop
  relabel_configs:
  - source_labels: [testSessionId]
    target_label: objectId
  - source_labels: [objectId]
    target_label: monitoredObjectId
  - source_labels: [testSessionName]
    target_label: monitoredObjectName
  - source_labels: [testSessionId]
    target_label: sessionId
  - source_labels: [direction]
    regex: "far-end"
    target_label: "direction"
    replacement: "0"
  - source_labels: [direction]
    regex: "near-end"
    target_label: "direction"
    replacement: "1"
  - source_labels: [direction]
    regex: "round-trip"
    target_label: "direction"
    replacement: "2"
  - source_labels: [timestamp]
    target_label: "date"
  - source_labels: [Timestamp]
    target_label: "timestamp"
  - source_labels: [testSessionId]
    target_label: "sessionId"
  - regex: "testSessionId"
    action: labeldrop
  - source_labels: [testSessionName]
    target_label: "name"
- job_name: cisco-telemetry-xr-slm-ak
  relabel_configs:
    - source_labels: [sessionId]
      target_label: monitoredObjectId
    - source_labels: [sessionName]
      target_label: monitoredObjectName

    ## Assign correct directions
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_sd_operation_metric_bucket_standard_deviation'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "0"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_ds_operation_metric_bucket_standard_deviation'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "1"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_sd_operation_metric_bucket_contents_unaggregated_sample_frames_lost'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "0"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_sd_operation_metric_bucket_contents_unaggregated_sample_frames_sent'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "0"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_ds_operation_metric_bucket_contents_unaggregated_sample_frames_lost'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "1"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_ds_operation_metric_bucket_contents_unaggregated_sample_frames_sent'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "1"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_availabilityPct'
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "0"

    ## Apply metric renaming
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_sd_operation_metric_bucket_standard_deviation'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "lossStdDev"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_ds_operation_metric_bucket_standard_deviation'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "lossStdDev"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_sd_operation_metric_bucket_contents_unaggregated_sample_frames_lost'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_operation_metric_bucket_contents_unaggregated_sample_frames_lost"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_ds_operation_metric_bucket_contents_unaggregated_sample_frames_lost'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_operation_metric_bucket_contents_unaggregated_sample_frames_lost"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_sd_operation_metric_bucket_contents_unaggregated_sample_frames_sent'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_operation_metric_bucket_contents_unaggregated_sample_frames_sent"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: 'sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_ds_operation_metric_bucket_contents_unaggregated_sample_frames_sent'
      target_label: _name_
      replacement: "sla_stats_metric_one_way_flr_operation_metric_bucket_contents_unaggregated_sample_frames_sent"

- job_name: default
  ## Relabeling rules which apply to label names.
  ## Note - by default the original labels are also kept.  If you wish to have the original named
  ##        labels removed, use a 'dropLabel' action such as the following:
  ##  - regex: {{insert your label name here}}
  ##    action: labeldrop
  relabel_configs:
  - source_labels: [sessionId]
    target_label: monitoredObjectId
  - source_labels: [sessionName]
    target_label: monitoredObjectName
  - source_labels: [direction]
    regex: "far-end"
    target_label: "direction"
    replacement: "0"
  - source_labels: [direction]
    regex: "near-end"
    target_label: "direction"
    replacement: "1"
  - source_labels: [direction]
    regex: "round-trip"
    target_label: "direction"
    replacement: "2"

- job_name: cisco-telemetry-xr-policy-ak
  relabel_configs:
    - source_labels: [sessionId]
      target_label: monitoredObjectId
    - source_labels: [sessionName]
      target_label: monitoredObjectName

    ## Assign correct directions
    - source_labels: [_name_]
      regex: "(policy_in.*)"
      target_label: direction
      replacement: "1"
    - source_labels: [_name_]
